encryption.description: List detailing encryption identity and key vault identifier

endpoint.description: String URL for connecting to the app configuration

identity.description: List with identity details including IDs and tenant information

local_auth_enabled.description: Boolean indicating if local authentication is enabled

location.description: String representing the geographical location of the resource

primary_read_key.description: List containing primary read access credentials and connection details

primary_write_key.description: List containing primary write access credentials and connection details

public_network_access.description: String indicating public network access status

public_network_access_enabled.description: Boolean indicating if public network access is enabled

purge_protection_enabled.description: Boolean indicating if purge protection is enabled

replica.description: List detailing replica endpoints and location information

secondary_read_key.description: List containing secondary read access credentials and connection details

secondary_write_key.description: List containing secondary write access credentials and connection details

sku.description: String defining the SKU tier of the app configuration

soft_delete_retention_days.description: Number of days for soft delete retention period

tags.description: Map of tags assigned to the resource for categorization
